title: hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. heterocephalum
intro: Hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. heterocephalum, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. heterocephalum include reducing inflammation, treating wounds and skin conditions, and supporting immune system function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
